scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --omit=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run migrate --prefix backend && npm run seed --prefix backend
scripts.audit:all: npm audit --prefix backend --audit-level=moderate && npm audit --prefix frontend --audit-level=moderate
scripts.audit:fix: npm audit fix --prefix backend && npm audit fix --prefix frontend
